name: Spicy Corn Bread
recipeIngredient: 3 Ears of fresh cooked corn Kernels only
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the chili until the skin is charred; set aside.
2. Fry the chopped chorizo for 10 minutes; discard the fat; set aside.
3. Saute the onion in butter for 10 minutes; set aside.
4. Chop the chili into small pieces.
5. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs and sour cream until smooth; stir in the chili, sausage, and onion.
6. In another bowl, combine the cornmeal, flour, baking soda, and baking powder. Stir in the sausage mix, soy sauce, and maple syrup, stirring just until blended.
7. Add in milk, cheese, and corn kernels. Pour into a lightly oiled 9-inch square baking dish.
8. Bake at 350 degrees until the top is browned and splitting, usually 30 to 45 minutes.
